texto: We are all the same and need to think that we are innocent. However, we do blame others just to be innocent. We simply believe blaming will wash out ourselves. More we search innocence more we blame others. What we need to understand our purity instead of trying to prove that we are blameless.
explicacao: Citação de Umut Kisa sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We are all the same and need to think that we are innocent. However, we do blame others just to b…” articula reflexao, blame, innocence em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como innocence e innocent.
